Bash(python -c "import forge3d as f3d; w = f3d.World\(\); b = w.add_box\(static=True\); print\('add_box static=True OK'\); c = w.add_capsule\(static=True\); print\('add_capsule static=True OK'\); b2 = w.add_box\(\); b2.friction = 0.1; b2.restitution = 0.9; b2.linear_damping = 0.5; b2.angular_damping = 0.3; print\(f'setters OK: friction={b2.friction}, restitution={b2.restitution}, ld={b2.linear_damping}'\); w.step\(1/60\); print\('step OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "import importlib, forge3d.facade; importlib.reload\(forge3d.facade\); import forge3d as f3d; importlib.reload\(f3d\); w = f3d.World\(\); b = w.add_box\(static=True\); print\('OK'\)")

Bash(python -c "import forge3d as f3d; w = f3d.World\(\); b = w.add_box\(static=True\); print\('add_box static=True OK'\); c = w.add_capsule\(static=True\); print\('add_capsule static=True OK'\); b2 = w.add_box\(\); b2.friction = 0.1; b2.linear_damping = 0.5; print\(f'friction={b2.friction}, ld={b2.linear_damping}'\); w.step\(\); print\('step OK'\)")
